title: Portfolio Assessment Configuration Schema (V2)
description: Simplified configuration schema for Goal-Driven AWS Transform Portfolio Agentic Readiness Assessment. This is a breaking change from V1 — old configs require migration.

portfolio_name.description: Name of the portfolio being assessed

goal.description: Modernization objective that acts as a priority lens over the assessment. Determines phase names, pathway alignment, criteria prioritization, and report framing.

goal_context.description: Optional free-text context for scoping recommendations. Influences Quick Agent Wins suggestions, portfolio service prioritization, and recommendation framing.
examples: Building a customer support agent for order and inventory data
Migrating off Oracle to reduce licensing costs by 60%

transformation_definitions.description: Names of the AWS Transform custom transformation definitions to use. These must match the names published to your AWS Transform registry.

individual_assessment.description: Transformation definition name for individual repository assessments

portfolio_assessment.description: Transformation definition name for portfolio-level aggregation

preferences.description: Global transformation preferences using flat prefer/avoid arrays. Replaces all V1 nested constraint objects. Per-repo preferences merge with (and can override) these global preferences.

prefer.description: Technologies, patterns, or approaches to prefer in recommendations (e.g., eks, aurora, bedrock, rest-api)

avoid.description: Technologies, patterns, or approaches to avoid in recommendations (e.g., serverless, self-managed-kafka, microservices-decomposition)

repositories.description: List of repositories to include in the portfolio assessment

name.description: Service/repository name (must be unique within portfolio)

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the repository root directory. If repository_url is provided and this path doesn't exist, it will be cloned here

priority.description: Business priority for this service (P0=Critical, P1=High, P2=Medium)

context.description: Optional free-text context about this repository (e.g., 'Main order processing service, handles 80% of traffic')

preferences.description: Per-repo transformation preferences. Merged with global preferences — per-repo avoid overrides global prefer for conflicts.

prefer.description: Technologies, patterns, or approaches to prefer for this repo

avoid.description: Technologies, patterns, or approaches to avoid for this repo

repo_type.description: Optional override for repository type classification. If not provided, the agent auto-detects during discovery.

tags.description: Optional tags for categorization (e.g., frontend, backend, data, ml, monolith)

repository_url.description: Optional Git repository URL. If provided and path doesn't exist, Kiro will clone the repository automatically

report_path.description: Optional explicit path to agentic-readiness-report.md (if not in standard location)

dependency_overrides.description: Optional manual dependency declarations (for cases where auto-detection fails)

description.description: Optional description of the dependency relationship
